task_goal: Improve repeatable indexing of Trump said the war was moving toward a ceasefire after productive conversations. How reliable is that claim right now?: Judge whether the signal is closer to a temporary de-escalation headline or a confirmed bilateral ceasefire arrangement.
winner_pattern: Lead with what was actually delayed or confirmed, then separate the denial, then judge credibility.
loser_pattern: Treating Trump's wording as proof that a ceasefire framework already exists.

credibility_reference.expected_judgment: Moderate confidence in de-escalation signaling, low confidence in a finalized ceasefire.

sources.name: AP
sources.support: Trump delayed planned strikes by five days and said conversations were productive.

sources.name: Axios
sources.support: Iranian state media said no direct or indirect contact occurred in the prior two days.

key_claims.claim: Trump signaled short-term de-escalation rather than a signed ceasefire agreement.
Iran publicly confirmed the same talks and terms.
The right framing is cooling signal, not verified settlement.

source_item.title: Trump ceasefire credibility check
source_item.claim_to_evaluate: Trump said the war was moving toward a ceasefire after productive conversations. How reliable is that claim right now?
source_item.baseline_goal: Judge whether the signal is closer to a temporary de-escalation headline or a confirmed bilateral ceasefire arrangement.

credibility_reference.expected_judgment: Moderate confidence in de-escalation signaling, low confidence in a finalized ceasefire.

rollback.rollback_rule: Rollback if the output turns a unilateral statement into a bilateral agreement or hides the denial signal.
